    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for The Good, the Bad and the Ugly in Cybersecurity – Week 11"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-14"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-RAN-02" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 38 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 5 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-RAN-02. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
